methodologies.name: Clear Communication
methodologies.description: Principles for clear, effective communication in all outputs

principles.name: Clarity First
principles.guidance: Use simple, direct language. Avoid jargon unless necessary for the audience.

principles.name: Structure
principles.guidance: Use clear headers, logical flow, and progressive disclosure of complexity.

principles.name: Audience Awareness
principles.description: Adapt to the audience's knowledge level
principles.guidance: Gauge expertise from context and adjust technical depth accordingly.

principles.name: Completeness
principles.guidance: Include all necessary context but avoid unnecessary repetition.

methodologies.name: Technical Writing
methodologies.description: Standards for technical documentation and explanations

principles.name: Accuracy
principles.guidance: Verify technical claims. Use precise terminology. Cite sources when applicable.

principles.name: Examples
principles.guidance: Provide working code samples, diagrams, or step-by-step walkthroughs.

principles.name: Layered Explanation
principles.guidance: Start with high-level overview, then dive into details. Allow readers to stop at their needed depth.

principles.name: Cross-Reference
principles.guidance: Reference prerequisite knowledge, related topics, and further reading.

methodologies.name: Clean Code
methodologies.description: Principles for writing maintainable, readable code

principles.name: Meaningful Names
principles.guidance: Names should explain what the variable/function does without needing comments.

principles.name: Single Responsibility
principles.description: Each function/class does one thing well
principles.guidance: If you need 'and' to describe what something does, it probably does too much.

principles.name: Small Functions
principles.guidance: Functions should be 20 lines or less. Extract helper functions for complex logic.

principles.name: DRY
principles.guidance: Extract common code into reusable functions. But don't over-abstract prematurely.

principles.name: Comments as Last Resort
principles.guidance: If you need a comment, first try to make the code clearer. Comments explain why, not what.

principles.name: Validate Inputs
principles.guidance: Validate function parameters, API inputs, user data. Fail fast with clear errors.

principles.name: Handle Errors Gracefully
principles.guidance: Use Result/Option types. Provide meaningful error messages. Never swallow errors silently.

principles.name: Assertion Sanity
principles.guidance: Use debug assertions for internal invariants. Document assumptions explicitly.

principles.name: Resource Safety
principles.guidance: Use RAII/Drop patterns. Handle cleanup in error paths. Avoid resource leaks.

methodologies.name: Security Awareness

principles.name: Input Sanitization
principles.guidance: Sanitize all user input. Use parameterized queries. Validate file paths.

principles.name: Least Privilege
principles.guidance: Run with minimal privileges. Scope permissions tightly. Drop privileges when not needed.

principles.name: Secure Defaults
principles.guidance: Enable security features by default. Require explicit opt-out for insecure options.

principles.name: Secret Management
principles.guidance: Never hardcode secrets. Use secure storage. Avoid logging sensitive data.

principles.name: Defense in Depth
principles.guidance: Don't rely on a single security measure. Combine multiple layers of protection.

security_checklist: Error handling (no stack traces to users)

principles.name: Measure First
principles.guidance: Never optimize without data. Use profilers to identify actual bottlenecks.

principles.name: Algorithm Selection
principles.guidance: Consider time/space complexity. Use appropriate data structures. O(n log n) vs O(n²) matters.

principles.name: Avoid Premature Optimization
principles.guidance: Write clear code first. Optimize only proven bottlenecks. Document performance-critical paths.

principles.name: Cache Wisely
principles.guidance: Cache expensive computations. Consider cache invalidation. Watch for memory pressure.

methodologies.name: Test-Driven Development

principles.name: Red-Green-Refactor
principles.description: Write failing test, make it pass, clean up
principles.guidance: Start with the simplest failing test. Write minimal code to pass. Then refactor.

principles.name: Test Behavior Not Implementation
principles.guidance: Test what the code does, not how it does it. Allows refactoring without breaking tests.

principles.name: One Assertion Per Test
principles.guidance: Each test should verify one behavior. Multiple assertions are ok if testing one logical concept.

principles.name: Descriptive Test Names
principles.guidance: test_should_return_error_when_user_not_found is better than test_get_user.

anti_patterns: Slow tests in fast feedback loop

principles.name: Consistency
principles.guidance: Use consistent naming, parameter ordering, error handling across the API.

principles.name: Discoverability
principles.description: Make the API easy to explore
principles.guidance: Logical grouping, clear naming, comprehensive documentation.

principles.name: Backward Compatibility
principles.guidance: Add new features additively. Deprecate before removing. Version breaking changes.

principles.name: Error Clarity
principles.guidance: Errors should explain what went wrong and suggest how to fix it.

principles.name: Data Validation
principles.guidance: Check for missing values, outliers, inconsistencies. Document data cleaning steps.

principles.name: Statistical Appropriateness
principles.guidance: Verify assumptions of statistical tests. Use appropriate visualizations.

principles.name: Reproducibility
principles.guidance: Document all steps. Use version control. Set random seeds. Share code and data.

principles.name: Honest Reporting
principles.guidance: Include limitations. Report negative results. Avoid cherry-picking.

principles.name: Separation of Concerns
principles.guidance: Keep UI, business logic, and data access separate. Use clear boundaries.

principles.name: Dependency Management
principles.guidance: Depend on abstractions. Minimize coupling. Use dependency injection.

principles.name: Scalability Awareness
principles.guidance: Consider how the system will scale. Identify potential bottlenecks early.

principles.name: Evolvability
principles.guidance: Make it easy to modify and extend. Avoid big bang rewrites.

principles.name: Audience First
principles.guidance: Different docs for different audiences: API reference vs tutorial vs conceptual guide.

principles.name: Keep Updated
principles.guidance: Treat docs as code. Update with code changes. Automate where possible.

principles.name: Example-Driven
principles.guidance: Include working examples. Test examples in CI. Show common use cases.

principles.name: Progressive Disclosure
principles.guidance: Quick start for newcomers. Deep dives for advanced users.

methodologies.name: Version Control Best Practices
methodologies.description: Effective use of version control systems

principles.name: Atomic Commits
principles.description: Each commit is one logical change
principles.guidance: Commit should be self-contained. Easy to review, revert, or cherry-pick.

principles.name: Meaningful Messages
principles.guidance: Subject line summarizes. Body explains reasoning. Reference issues/tickets.

principles.name: Branch Strategy
principles.guidance: Feature branches for development. Protected main branch. Clear merge strategy.

principles.name: History Hygiene
principles.guidance: Squash trivial commits. Rebase for linear history when appropriate.

methodologies.name: Error Message Design

principles.name: Explain What Happened
principles.guidance: State what went wrong in user terms. Avoid internal jargon or codes.

principles.name: Suggest Solutions
principles.guidance: Provide actionable next steps. Link to documentation. Offer alternatives.

principles.name: Include Context
principles.guidance: Show what input caused the error. Include timestamps, IDs for debugging.

principles.name: Appropriate Tone
principles.guidance: Avoid 'you did wrong'. Focus on 'here's how to fix it'.

anti_patterns: Technical stack traces to end users

methodologies.name: Mathematical Rigor
methodologies.description: Standards for mathematical reasoning and proofs

principles.name: Explicit Assumptions
principles.guidance: List prerequisites. Define all terms. State domain restrictions.

principles.name: Logical Steps
principles.guidance: Justify each transformation. Reference theorems used. No hand-waving.

principles.name: Variable Tracking
principles.guidance: Introduce variables before use. Track constraints. Avoid variable shadowing.

principles.name: Edge Cases
principles.guidance: Check division by zero. Consider empty sets. Verify convergence.

principles.name: Strategy Selection
principles.guidance: Direct proof, contradiction, induction, construction - match to problem structure.

principles.name: Induction Structure
principles.guidance: Clear base case. Explicit induction hypothesis. Verify induction step uses hypothesis.

principles.name: Contradiction Setup
principles.guidance: State assumption clearly. Derive genuine contradiction. Conclude correctly.

principles.name: Case Analysis
principles.guidance: Ensure cases are mutually exclusive and collectively exhaustive.

proof_templates.contradiction: Assume for contradiction that ¬P. [derive Q and ¬Q]. Contradiction. Therefore P.
proof_templates.induction: Base case: [verify P(0)]. Induction hypothesis: Assume P(k). Induction step: Show P(k) → P(k+1).

principles.name: Experimental Design
principles.guidance: Define independent/dependent variables. Include controls. Consider confounds.

principles.name: Statistical Power
principles.guidance: Calculate required sample size. Report effect sizes. Consider multiple testing.

principles.name: Data Provenance
principles.guidance: Document data collection. Version datasets. Track all transformations.

principles.name: Open Science
principles.guidance: Publish protocols. Share raw data when possible. Enable replication.

methodologies.name: Image Analysis Standards
methodologies.description: Guidelines for image processing and analysis

principles.name: Preprocessing Documentation
principles.guidance: Record resize, crop, normalize steps. Maintain original when possible.

principles.name: Annotation Quality
principles.guidance: Clear annotation guidelines. Inter-annotator agreement. Quality checks.

principles.name: Resolution Awareness
principles.guidance: Document original resolution. Note upscaling artifacts. Consider multi-scale.

principles.name: Sample Rate Handling
principles.guidance: Document original sample rate. Use appropriate resampling. Consider Nyquist.

principles.name: Noise Documentation
principles.guidance: Document recording conditions. Apply appropriate filtering. Note SNR.
